RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/pgsql/crtbl_schema.bash
RuleSet.GenFile: #!/bin/bash # # @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssBashScriptLicense$ $parsePgSqlArgs$$validatePgSqlArgs$ $iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateSecTable empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateNonSecTable empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each maybe_CreateTableH )$
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch TableName Cluster invoke_CreateTable Tenant invoke_CreateTable SecApp invoke_CreateTable SecForm invoke_CreateTable SecGroup invoke_CreateTable SecGroupForm invoke_CreateTable SecGroupInclude invoke_CreateTable SecGroupMember invoke_CreateTable SecSession invoke_CreateTable SecUser invoke_CreateTable default empty$

$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecApp empty SecForm empty SecGroup empty SecGroupForm empty SecGroupInclude empty SecGroupMember empty SecSession empty SecUser empty default invoke_CreateTable$

psql -h $${pghost} $${PGPORT} -d $${pgdb} -U $${pguser} -a -e -f $dbadminfilename_CreateTable$ >>$${logfilename} 2>&1 $iterate DispensedId16Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg16Table each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId32Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg32Table each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId64Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg64Table each empty empty empty )$
